name: CONTRACT-BUG-25
title: feature-json-template.json carries field forbidden by schema with additionalProperties:false
description: templates/feature-json-template.json includes a 'template_version' top-level field. feature.json.schema.json has additionalProperties:false and does not list 'template_version' among allowed properties. Rendering the template yields a document that fails schema validation. The template field should be moved out of the JSON content (e.g. into a comment-only sibling) or the schema should allow it.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
